title: CORAX Producer Summary
description: Structured summary output by Codex-Producer. Written to -o file, parsed by skill for gate and subsequent steps.

producer_id.description: Identifier for this producer invocation, e.g. phase-3-plan-a-round-1

task_summary.description: 2-3 sentence restatement of what this phase was tasked to do

metrics.description: Raw metrics produced by this phase. Structure depends on phase.

methodology_notes.description: Key methodology decisions, one per item. Used by Sentinel for cross-phase consistency check.

assumptions.description: Explicit assumptions made. Must list at least 1.

limitations.description: Honest limitations. Must list at least 1. No-limitations is suspicious.

fix_round.description: 0 for first attempt, N for Nth fix cycle

mutation_round.description: 0 for non-mutation, N for Nth mutation ladder round

self_reported_confidence.description: Producer's self-assessed confidence in this output. Subject to 'full pass suspect' downgrade.
